'''Doggy Charm''' is a consumable item that spawns a trained dog.

{{Item
| image = Doggy charm.png
| id = doggy_charm
| type = Utilities
| stackable = 64
| Description = Shift + Right-Click your dog to cycle between all available Classical Variants.
}}

== Obtaining ==
=== Upon Creating A New World ===
If you have '''<code>enable_starting_items</code>''' set to '''<code>true</code>''' on your server configuration file. You can use the [[Starter Bundle]] automatically presented in your inventory when you first join that world.

== Usage ==
* '''<code>Right click</code>''' to use the item.
* '''<code>Sneak + Right click</code>''' on your dog to change its variant.

== Trivia ==

* It was introduced in the original Doggy Talents.
* The Doggy Charm is used as an icon for the old DTN logo. It was also featured in many places like the banner or watermarks.
* The item's new sprite took inspiration from the '''[https://static.wikia.nocookie.net/okami/images/e/e9/Traveler%27s_Charm_icon.png/revision/latest?cb=20201228001834 Charms]''' from the popular game Okami.<ref>https://okami.fandom.com/wiki/Tools</ref>
<references />
